calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Victoria Valenzuela, 650-740-8293 Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Hearing is held. Defendant reports she can't pay anything. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT VICTORIA VALENZUELA.

Upheld/Granted. The Sheriff is to release any funds it is holding to be returned to the Ms. Valenzuela.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Vicki Gross, CSR #5525, vgross@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT VICTORIA VALENZUELA.

Continued to July 19, 2018 at 9:30 am on the Court's own motion.
